_comment: Visibility + owner manifest for the <Evidence> footnote component. The PROD bundle reads owner/name/public to decide, with NO network call, whether an evidence permalink may render as a clickable link (public repos) or must degrade to prose-only (private repos, to avoid a public 404 + path/SHA leak). In dev/localhost every link renders regardless of visibility (it's just the author, behind their own GitHub auth). Keep `public` honest: flipping a repo public on GitHub means setting it true here so its links go live in prod. `localPath` is used ONLY by scripts/validate-footnotes.js (relative to bytesofpurpose-blog/) to find the local clone for offline SHA/path/line verification; the component never reads it. Validated by scripts/validate-footnotes.js (every <Evidence repo=...> must appear here).
